creator: ypankov@fastmail.com
text: Cy, the problem submitter describes is not about adding entries to termcap.  The problem seems to be that recent screen versions set the TERM to that weird "screen.xterm-256color" for them -- I was NOT able to reproduce it (i.e. for me it's "screen" by default and "xterm-256color" with "term xterm-256color" in ~/.screenrc) and just trying to clarify.
